Meta.title: IGEE-Elektroniker | Energy & Building Technology
Meta.description: Your reliable partner for modern electrical installations, energy efficiency and intelligent building technology – nationally and internationally.

Hero.title: IGEE-Elektroniker
Hero.subtitle: Energy & Building Technology
Hero.description: Your partner for modern electrical installations, energy efficiency and intelligent building technology

Welcome.title: Welcome to IGEE-Elektroniker
Welcome.description1: IGEE-Elektroniker is your reliable partner – nationally and internationally – for modern electrical installations, energy efficiency and intelligent building technology. We rely on innovative solutions suited for both private households and commercial and industrial use.
Welcome.description2: Our range of services extends from classic electrical installations to advanced smart home systems. You receive all services from a single source – individually tailored and professionally implemented.

Services.title: Our Services
Services.subtitle: From new construction to smart home solutions – we offer you the complete spectrum of electrical and building technology.
Services.elecDesc: New construction & renovation, distribution boards, outlets, lighting systems
Services.energyDesc: Energy-efficient systems, load management, network technology
Services.smartDesc: KNX / LOXONE, intelligent control of lighting, heating & security
Services.pvDesc: PV system planning & installation, battery storage
Services.industryDesc: Control cabinet construction, commissioning, circuit diagrams
Services.measureDesc: System measurements DIN VDE, equipment and machine measurements
Services.lightingDesc: Professional indoor and outdoor lighting solutions
Services.electronicsDesc: Maintenance, rental, buying and selling of electrical devices & components
Services.maintenanceDesc: Regular inspections, fault service, system extensions
Services.securityDesc: Professional security solutions for buildings and facilities

ServiceElec.title: Electrical Installation
ServiceElec.subtitle: Professional electrical installations for new builds and existing properties
ServiceElec.intro: From planning to execution, we provide professional electrical installations for all requirements.

ServiceEnergy.title: Energy & Building Technology
ServiceEnergy.subtitle: Modern solutions for greater energy efficiency
ServiceEnergy.intro: We develop tailor-made energy solutions that reduce your operating costs and increase comfort.

ServiceSmartHome.title: Smart Home
ServiceSmartHome.subtitle: Intelligent living and working with state-of-the-art technology
ServiceSmartHome.intro: We integrate powerful smart home systems that offer you maximum comfort and energy savings.
ServiceSmartHome.item1: Intelligent control of lighting, heating & security
ServiceSmartHome.item2: KNX / LOXONE modern smart home systems

ServicePV.intro: Benefit from clean solar energy and sustainably reduce your energy costs.

ServiceIndustry.title: Industry
ServiceIndustry.subtitle: Reliable solutions for industrial requirements

ServiceMeasure.item5: Medical device testing DIN EN 62353 VDE 0751

ServiceElectronics.item1: Maintenance and repair of electrical devices
ServiceElectronics.item3: Buying and selling of electrical devices
ServiceElectronics.item4: Buying and selling of electronic components

ServiceMaintenance.title: Maintenance & Service
ServiceMaintenance.subtitle: Reliable care of your systems
ServiceMaintenance.intro: Regular maintenance extends the lifespan of your systems and prevents costly failures.

About.title: Partnership and Expertise
About.description1: We see ourselves as a collaborative partner for companies operating in Europe, as well as companies wishing to invest in Africa, sell goods or realize projects. With our experience, we accompany your venture and provide advisory support at every step.
About.description2: Our specialist company for energy and building technology is characterized by high competence, reliability and clean execution. We develop and implement individual solutions tailored exactly to your requirements.
About.description3: Our goal is to connect modern technology with efficient energy use. We place great value on high-quality materials, compliance with current standards, and personal, individual consulting. This is how we create sustainable and future-proof solutions for our customers.
About.internationalDesc: Partnerships for projects in Africa also possible.
About.internationalDetail: We accompany companies operating in Europe or wishing to invest in Africa, sell goods or realize projects.

WhyUs.title: Why us?
WhyUs.subtitle: We think not only about today, but about the energy of tomorrow.
WhyUs.r1: Individual solutions instead of standard solutions

Partners.title: Our Partners
Partners.subtitle: We work with leading manufacturers and technology partners.

Projects.title: Projects
Projects.subtitle: Reference projects from our work
Projects.p1Desc: Complete electrical installation of a single-family house with modern security systems.
Projects.p2Desc: Planning and execution of electrical installation in a multi-family building.
Projects.p3Desc: Modernization of an existing building with KNX smart home system.
Projects.p4Desc: Energy efficiency measures and load management for a commercial property.

Contact.title: Get in touch
Contact.subtitle: Use our contact form or call us directly – we will get back to you as soon as possible.

CTA.title: Start your project with IGEE-Elektroniker
CTA.description: From planning to execution – we accompany you every step of the way. Contact us for a non-binding quote.
